texto: Your eyes having a nervous breakdown? Do you not know what to do? Well-guess what!” He stomps to the left of the recruit, pushing the recruit’s head into his until their cheeks meld together. He points out in front of them both. “I don’t care if some monkey is rippin’ your eyeballs out with rusty nails! YOU STARE UP FRONT AT ATTENTION! RIGHT THERE! IS THAT CLEAR!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de J.K. Brown que provoca temas ligados a humor. Ao questionar “Your eyes having a nervous breakdown? Do you not know what to do? Well-guess what!” He stomps to …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre humor, bootcamp, military, com foco em humor e military.
